return(function(...)local return(function(L,n,A,g,z,s,R,v,F,K,W,S,p,t,T,c,d,V,r,j,f,O,M,X,N)p,S,F,t,r,v,j,c,W,X,K,f,N,O,V,T,d,M={},function(L,y)local n=r(y)local A=function(A,g,z,s,R,p)return t(L,{A,g;z,s,R;p},y,n)end return A
